headlines.headline: Lloyds Banking Group introduces AI investment tool for customers
headlines.summary: First UK lender to use AI for investment decisions as scrutiny on AI in financial advice grows.

headlines.headline: AI eliminating jobs on Wall Street - major bank cuts 1,000 positions
headlines.summary: Bank cites 'eliminating work and applying technology' through AI for attrition-based job cuts.

headlines.headline: Top law firm Sullivan & Cromwell apologizes for AI hallucinations in court filing
headlines.summary: Lawyers submitted court filing with fake citations created by AI, highlighting ongoing reliability concerns.

headlines.headline: Snap CEO announces 1,000 layoffs, cites rapid AI advancements
headlines.summary: Roughly quarter of planned headcount cut as AI changes workforce needs.

headlines.headline: PwC study: 75% of AI economic gains captured by just 20% of companies
headlines.summary: Leading companies focused on growth rather than just productivity are pulling ahead in AI returns.

headlines.headline: Generative AI now has 'seat in the war room' for military decisions
headlines.summary: AI reshaping military intelligence sharing, Big Tech partnerships, and lethal decision-making processes.

headlines.headline: Software developer employment for ages 22-25 down 20% since 2022
headlines.summary: Study suggests AI beginning to affect young workers in specific professions.

top_story.headline: AI eliminating jobs on Wall Street - major bank cuts 1,000 positions
top_story.summary: A major bank's bottom line was helped by shedding 1,000 jobs through attrition by 'eliminating work and applying technology,' which executives specified was artificial intelligence. This marks a significant moment in AI's impact on high-skill professional jobs.
